title: Do not open Conversations/Updates when accessing a Board Item from My Work
excerpt: If I click on a Board Item through “My Work”, please remove the default where the Conversations/Updates window opens. 99.9% of the time I am not accessing the Board to create an Update, but rather to view or edit a colum…

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: If I click on a Board Item through “My Work”, please remove the default where the Conversations/Updates window opens. 99.9% of the time I am not accessing the Board to create an Update, but rather to view or edit a column within the Board itself, but I have to click to close the Update window to get it out of my way first. If I’m in Monday everyday (and I am!) … that is a lot of extra clicking I’m doing to close that window every time.
